items.title: Pirro says DOJ won't drop Fed probe, will appeal judge's order blocking Powell subpoenas
items.description: Powell has accused the DOJ of targeting him for refusing to obey Trump's demand that the Fed sharply lower interest rates.

items.title: Virginia redistricting election win buoys congressional Democrats
items.description: Virginia voted by a slim margin on Tuesday to approve U.S. House district maps that could allow Democrats to flip four seats in the state this Novembe...

items.title: Bessent says 'many' U.S. allies have asked for currency swaps amid Iran war turbulence
items.description: The White House on Tuesday said the UAE had not requested a currency swap line.

items.title: Rep. David Scott, a Georgia Democrat seeking his 13th term in Congress, dies at age 80
items.description: U.S. Rep. David Scott, a Georgia Democrat and the first Black chairman of the House Agriculture Committee, has died at age 80.

items.title: Thief who swiped purse of ex-DHS chief Kristi Noem gets 3 years in prison
items.description: The man, Chilean national Mario Bustamante Leiva, "came to Washington illegally to prey on citizens of the District," said U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro...
